_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Hytale
author: hello@pterodactyl.io
description: Set out on an adventure built for both creation and play. Hytale blends the freedom of a sandbox with the momentum of an RPG: explore a procedurally generated world full of dungeons, secrets, and a variety of creatures, then shape it block by block.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
set -e

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

echo -e "Downloading Hytale Downloader CLI..."

DOWNLOAD_URL="https://downloader.hytale.com/hytale-downloader.zip"

rm -f hytale-downloader.zip
curl -o hytale-downloader.zip $DOWNLOAD_URL
unzip -o hytale-downloader.zip -d hytale-downloader
mv hytale-downloader/hytale-downloader-linux-amd64 hytale-downloader/hytale-downloader-linux
chmod 555 hytale-downloader/hytale-downloader-linux

echo -e "Verifying Hytale Downloader installation..."

echo -e "Hytale Downloader version: `./hytale-downloader/hytale-downloader-linux -version`"

echo -e "Hytale Downloader installed successfully."

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Automatically update game files on startup.

variables.name: Auth Mode
variables.description: Authentication mode.

variables.name: Patchline
variables.description: Server branch preference, Update.Patchline inside the config.json overrides this.

variables.name: Server Version
variables.description: Version to run: latest, previous or a specific version.

variables.name: Pre-Authentication
variables.description: Pre-authenticate via OAuth2 before server start.

variables.name: Enable World Backups
variables.description: Enable automatic world backups by the game server.

variables.name: Enable Server Backup
variables.description: Store a backup of the previous server version on update or patchline change.

variables.name: Server Backup Retention
variables.description: Number of server version backups to retain per patchline.

variables.name: Backup Directory
variables.description: Directory for world backups.

variables.name: Backup Frequency
variables.description: Backup interval in minutes.

variables.name: Backup Max Count
variables.description: Maximum number of world backups.

variables.name: Backup Archive Max Count
variables.description: Maximum number of backup archives to retain.

variables.name: Use AOT Cache
variables.description: Enable Ahead-Of-Time compilation cache for faster startup.

variables.name: Compact Object Headers
variables.description: Enable JVM compact object headers for reduced memory usage.

variables.name: Allow Self-OP
variables.description: Allow players to use /op self to grant themselves operator permissions.

variables.name: Load Early Plugins
variables.description: Loads binary injection plugins for the server, enable only if you understand the stability risks.

variables.name: Disable Sentry
variables.description: Disable Sentry error reporting and telemetry.

variables.name: Ignore Broken Mods
variables.description: Ignore broken mods, allowing the server to boot even if a mod fails to load.

variables.name: Transport
variables.description: Network transport protocol. QUIC (UDP) is default; use TCP if UDP/QUIC is blocked by your host or network.

variables.name: Profile UUID
variables.description: Specify a specific Hytale profile UUID for the servers session.
